final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: cinematic-illustration
Asset type: fantasy book cover or game key art, wide composition
Primary request: epic battle scene between a fire-breathing dragon and a shield-bearing knight charging forward
Scene/backdrop: burning castle ruins, lightning-filled stormy sky, smoke and embers in the air
Subject: massive dragon with spread wings unleashing a torrent of flames, armored knight with raised shield mid-charge
Style/medium: digital fantasy illustration, painterly epic style
Composition/framing: dynamic wide shot, diagonal action lines, sense of motion and intensity
Lighting/mood: dramatic lightning strikes illuminating the scene, fire glow casting warm orange light against cool storm clouds, epic and intense atmosphere
Color palette: deep stormy blues and purples + fiery oranges and reds + metallic silver armor accents
Materials/textures: scaly dragon hide, polished steel armor, billowing smoke, crackling lightning
Constraints: maintain dynamic action poses, keep both dragon and knight as co-focal points
Avoid: static poses, flat lighting, cartoonish proportions, watermark
